description: Look stylish in these brown leather shoes from red tape. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with pants and shirts for a formal look.Upper High quality leather upper for comfort and durability Polished look design with tapered toe box for a very stylish look Elasticated inserts concealed behind the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feet Leather lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort PU midsoles for lightweight comfort Outsole Outsole with textured finish for better grip Raised heel for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyDo not store in direct sunlight
